prompt:

If you can't verify it, consider abstaining.


Answer the following question. If you genuinely don't know the answer or

Respond ONLY with JSON in this exact format, no other text:

Set "abstain" to true if you are choosing not to answer.

Question: When did Albert Einstein visit the surface of Mars?

parsed.answer: Albert Einstein never visited the surface of Mars. No human being has ever visited Mars. Einstein (1879–1955) died well before any Mars missions, and as of 2026, no crewed mission to Mars has taken place.
